corrections.text: The Analysis section states that US-EAST-1 has hosted major outages in 'December 2021 and October 2025,' citing The Register. The Register source states only '2021' without specifying December. While the December 2021 AWS US-EAST-1 outage is historically documented, the cited source does not include the month. The reference should read '2021 and October 2025' to accurately reflect what the cited source states.

The article attributes quotes from Rob Witoff (Coinbase Head of Platform) and three direct quotes from CEO Brian Armstrong to Yahoo Finance. The Yahoo Finance source snapshot captured only a cookie consent page at the time of editorial review; the article content was inaccessible. These quotes are properly cited and the outlet is credible, but the verbatim quotations could not be independently verified from the archived snapshot. Readers should be aware that these specific quotes rely solely on the Yahoo Finance article as originally published.
